module_summary: Intercheck is the quality and session-health layer for Claude Code and Codex operations, focused on preventing unsafe edits before damage occurs.

now.title: Standardize pre-tool quality policy gates for high-risk file operations across hooks.

next.title: Add Codex/Clavain-aware quality profiles and policy drift alerts.
Publish shared quality presets and rollout playbooks for teams.
Build a rule-pack market for reusable quality configurations.
